name: Thorny Rope Cuffs
descs:
Turn Start: This Gift activates for the whole Encounter when 5 or more Identities have Attack Skills that apply [Burst] Potency or Count. (except E.G.O Skills; except Backup Units)

When an enemy's [Burst] Count drops below 1 in combat, consume 20 [Burst] Potency instead of [Burst] Count (at less than 20 [Burst] Potency, however, the effect ends)

On Hit, when the target has 1 [Burst] Count in combat, inflict +1 more [Burst] Count (2 times per Encounter)
